title: RollbackResult
description: NDJSON output for the atomwrite rollback subcommand. Emits one event per restored file (type: rollback) followed by a final summary event (type: summary).

type.description: Event discriminator. 'rollback' for the per-file event, 'summary' for the final rollup, 'error' on failure.

path.description: Absolute path of the file that was restored.

restored_from.description: Absolute path of the backup file used as the source of restoration.

timestamp.description: Backup timestamp (YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS) used for the restore, when --timestamp was passed explicitly.

checksum_before.description: BLAKE3 checksum of the file before the rollback (i.e. the on-disk state being overwritten).

checksum_after.description: BLAKE3 checksum of the file after the rollback (i.e. the restored content).

verified.description: True if --verify was passed and the BLAKE3 post-restore check succeeded.

dry_run.description: True if the rollback was previewed without writing.

files_restored.description: Number of files restored (present in summary event).

files_failed.description: Number of files that failed to restore (present in summary event).

error.description: Error message string when type is 'error'.

code.description: Machine-readable error code when type is 'error'.
